title: ZXSpace is Under Development
content: Players can expect retro-inspired visuals, arcade-style action, enemy waves, power-ups, achievements, leaderboards, and the fast-paced gameplay that helped define classic space shooters.

[ZXSpace](/apps/zxspace) is part of the growing [ZX Series](/zx-series), a connected collection of retro-inspired games from BarkinMad Studios featuring shared achievements, leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins, and cross-game progression systems.

Development is currently focused on refining gameplay, balancing enemy encounters, expanding progression systems, and ensuring the game delivers the pick-up-and-play experience expected from classic arcade titles.
As development continues, additional features, content, and gameplay details will be revealed ahead of ZXSpace's future release on the App Store.
Follow the latest news from BarkinMad Studios and the [ZX Series](/zx-series) for future updates on [ZXSpace](/apps/zxspace) and other upcoming retro arcade projects.
